title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SENTENCE IMPROVEMENT 101 200 BY

questions.question: I am down with her complaints.
questions.explanation: **'Fed up with'** का अर्थ है **चिढ़चिढ़ा या निराश होना (irritated/frustrated)**.

questions.question: The little boy cried with pain when he burnt his fingers.
questions.explanation: यह वाक्य **Grammatically सही** है (Simple Past Tense).

questions.question: The skunk had a conspicuous spinal stripe.
questions.explanation: **'Conspicuous'** का अर्थ है **आसानी से दिखाई देने वाला (noticeable)**.

questions.question: Rahul had strong pain in his stomach.
questions.explanation: **'Severe'** (गंभीर) का प्रयोग **तीव्र दर्द (strong/extreme pain)** के लिए होता है.

questions.question: Children should avoid giving out personal details online which will identify them or their location.
questions.explanation: **'That could'** का प्रयोग **संभावना (possibility)** को दर्शाने के लिए होता है.

questions.question: The company do not broke the law at any time.
questions.explanation: **Singular Subject** के साथ **'does not'** और **V1 ('break')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: He was not happy until he gave up his job and live as a fakir in the forests.
options: until he gave up his job and lived
until he gives up his job and lived
unless he gave up his job and lives
until he gave up his job and lives
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Simple Past Tense** में है, इसलिए **'live'** के स्थान पर **'lived'** (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Dhruv's anger blazed of uncontrollably.
questions.explanation: **'Blazed up'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **क्रोध का तीव्र होना (emotion becoming intense)**.

questions.question: This win could enhance to be a historic turning point in the fortunes of the team.
questions.explanation: **'Prove'** का अर्थ है **साबित होना या परिणाम दिखाना**, जो संदर्भ में सही है.

questions.question: Mothers have great animosity for their children.
questions.explanation: **'Animosity'** (दुश्मनी) के विपरीत, **'Affection'** (स्नेह) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Sonam's cat used to chase the mouse into the kitchen and knock through a tower of pots and pans.
options: knock over a tower of pots
knock out a tower of pots
knock away a tower of pots
knock inside a tower of pots
questions.explanation: **'Knock over'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **किसी चीज़ को गलती से गिरा देना**.

questions.question: A soldier of the tenth legion leaped into the water as soon as the ship touches the shore.
options: the ship was touch the shore
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Past Tense ('leaped')** में है, इसलिए **'touches'** के स्थान पर **'touched'** (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: We feel warm on the subject
questions.explanation: **'Warmly about'** (मैत्रीपूर्ण तरीके से) **Adverb** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The dictator ordered the traitor were jailed.
questions.explanation: Noun **'traitor'** के बाद **Passive Infinitive 'to be jailed'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: He has broken his leg yesterday.
options: He had broke his leg yesterday.
He have broken his leg yesterday.
He has broke his leg yesterday.
questions.explanation: Adverb **'yesterday'** (Simple Past) के कारण **'broke'** (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Please take many as you want.
questions.explanation: **'As much as'** (उतना ही जितना) सही Phrase है, **'many'** के स्थान पर **'much'** आएगा क्योंकि 'as' के बाद countable/uncountable का निर्धारण नहीं है.

questions.question: Rimjhim received a children's very illustrated colourful atlas on her 10th birthday.
options: an very illustrated colourful children's atlas
a very colourful illustrated children's atlas
a very illustrated colourful atlas children
a colourful very illustrated children's atlas
questions.explanation: **Opinion (colourful) > Size > Age (children's) > Noun (atlas)** क्रम में **'colourful'** पहले आएगा.

questions.question: The Privacy Shield establishes a process to allow companies to transfer consumer data from European Union countries to the United States in compliance in EU law.
questions.explanation: **'Compliance'** के साथ **'with'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: This book provides an unrestrained account of the natural resources in India.
questions.explanation: **'Unrestrained'** (बिना रोक-टोक) के समान अर्थ **'Exhaustive'** (विस्तृत/सम्पूर्ण) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: That Macbook belong to Xavier.
options: That Macbook is belong to Xavier.
That Macbook is belonged to Xavier.
questions.explanation: **Singular Subject ('Macbook')** के साथ **Singular Verb ('belongs')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: It will take two hours to walk across the forest.
questions.explanation: **'Through'** का अर्थ है **किसी चीज़ के एक छोर से दूसरे छोर तक** (जंगल के अंदर से).

questions.question: We set up on the journey early in the morning.
questions.explanation: **'Set off'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **यात्रा शुरू करना (begin a journey)**.

questions.question: You can be sentenced for trespassing on someone else's property
questions.explanation: **'Trespassing'** का अर्थ है **बिना अनुमति के प्रवेश करना (entering without permission)**.

questions.question: The wizard, while performing an item, accidentally set his own hat on fire and prompted the fire alarm to go on.
options: the fire alarm to go above
the fire alarm to go off
the fire alarm to go under
the fire alarm to go away
questions.explanation: **'Go off'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **जोर से बजना (ring loudly)**.

questions.question: In every country of the world, primary caregivers are the women of children and elders.
options: women are the caregivers primary of
the women primary caregivers are of
women are the primary caregivers of
primary caregivers women are of the
questions.explanation: **Plural Subject ('women')** के साथ **Plural Verb ('are')** और **Noun-Phrase ('primary caregivers of')** का सही क्रम.

questions.question: The woman lost much to her body weight due to diabetes.
options: off her body weight due to
from her body weight due to
for her body weight due to
of her body weight due to
questions.explanation: **'Of'** Preposition का प्रयोग **किसी चीज़ के भाग या हिस्से** (portion) को दर्शाने के लिए होता है.

questions.question: An imperfect positioning of the Sun, Earth and Moon results in the Moon passing through only part of Earth's umbra, resulting in a partial lunar eclipse.
questions.explanation: **'Positioning'** के लिए **'Alignment'** (सही सापेक्ष स्थिति में व्यवस्था) सही शब्द है.

questions.question: The new chief is gifted at the power of eloquence.
questions.explanation: **'Gifted'** के साथ **'with'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है (gifted with exceptional talent).

questions.question: The recent cloudburst completely dismantled the village and its people.
questions.explanation: **'Dismantled'** (अलग करना) के लिए **'took apart'** phrasal verb का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The annual seed festival hosted in Auroville promote sharing of traditional knowledge and sustainable farming practices.
questions.explanation: **Singular Subject ('The annual seed festival')** के साथ **Singular Verb ('promotes')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The sudden declaration of war between two countries led to a disarray.
questions.explanation: **'Disarray'** (अव्यवस्था) का अर्थ है **'disorderly situation'** (अव्यवस्थित स्थिति).

questions.question: Greta Thunberg's tirade against environmental degeneration shocked the world leaders.
questions.explanation: **'Tirade'** का अर्थ है **लंबा और गुस्से भरा भाषण (long and angry speech)**.

questions.question: He lived on the bank of a mighty river, broad and deep, that have always silently rolling on to a vast undiscovered ocean.
questions.explanation: **Singular Subject ('mighty river')** के लिए **'which was'** (Past Continuous) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: If you are thinking about investing in share markets, isn't it make sense to find an expert ?
questions.explanation: **Simple Present Tense** में **Singular Subject ('it')** के लिए **'doesn't it'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The novel highlights the place of the endangered species in the rainforest.
questions.explanation: **'Place'** के स्थान पर **'Plight'** (दुर्दशा) का प्रयोग होगा, जो विलुप्तप्राय प्रजातियों के लिए सही है.

questions.question: I gave my best dress to her on condition that she return it the very next day in a clean condition.
options: on the condition that she would return
on the conditions that she had return
on the condition that she return
questions.explanation: Past Tense में **अपेक्षित भविष्य (expected future)** के लिए **'would return'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The boy watched a sci-fi movie in the lieu of playing in the game zone.
questions.explanation: **'In lieu of'** (के बदले में) सही phrase है, जिसके बाद **Gerund ($V_{ing}$)** आता है.

questions.question: In the winter season, the poor woman needed a refuge where she could live freely and independently.
questions.explanation: **'Refuge'** (शरण) का अर्थ है **'Shelter'** (आश्रय).

questions.question: The revolt of the labourers will be considered as an epoch in the world history.
questions.explanation: **'Epoch'** का अर्थ है **एक महत्वपूर्ण अवधि (important period)**.

questions.question: A newer, more effective computer system was installed in place of the obsolete one.
questions.explanation: **'Obsolete'** (अप्रचलित) का अर्थ है **'outdated'** (पुराना).

questions.question: I had to write a letter of mistake to my father for the blunder I made.
questions.explanation: **'Blunder'** (बड़ी गलती) के लिए **'apology'** (माफ़ी) पत्र लिखा जाता है.

questions.question: All tickets of the FIFA World Cup have been sold away.
options: All tickets of the FIFA World Cup have been sold out.
All tickets of the FIFA World Cup have been sold among.
All tickets of the FIFA World Cup have been sold into.
All tickets of the FIFA World Cup have been sold across.
questions.explanation: **'Sold out'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **सभी टिकट बिक जाना**.

questions.question: Employers in many developing countries report that a lack of skilled workers is a major and increasing bottleneck for their operations, affected their capacity to innovate.
questions.explanation: **Present Participle 'affecting' ($V_{ing}$)** का प्रयोग **Noun ('bottleneck')** द्वारा किए जा रहे कार्य को दर्शाने के लिए होगा.

questions.question: Planets in our solar system close and big for them to twinkle.
questions.explanation: **'Too...to'** structure (are **too** close and big **to** twinkle) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: He asked his father when would come the next letter.
questions.explanation: Indirect Question में **Wh-word + Subject + Modal** क्रम होता है: **'the next letter would come'**.

questions.question: Although I have a lot of work to do, I am determined to finish it all by the end of the day so that I can enjoy my weekend not having any imminent due dates.
options: not with any pressure of due date
questions.explanation: **'Imminent due dates'** (आसन्न समय सीमा) के लिए **'looming deadlines'** (निकट आती समय सीमा) सही है.

questions.question: Vihaan is clumsy at dancing.
questions.explanation: **'All thumbs'** idiom का अर्थ है **अनाड़ी (clumsy)**.

questions.question: The crux of the study has been delineated by the researcher.
questions.explanation: **'Crux'** का अर्थ है **सबसे महत्वपूर्ण या केंद्रीय बिंदु (central point)**.

questions.question: Since my friend was not feeling well, she asked me to come over and take care of her.
questions.explanation: **'Come over'** (घर आना) **Grammatically सही** है.

questions.question: Yoga may manage pain and helping reduce stress.
questions.explanation: **Modal 'may'** के बाद **V1 ('help')** और **'help in $V_{ing}$'** (help in reducing) सही structure है.

questions.question: He has grown into a beautiful youth.
questions.explanation: **पुरुष ('youth')** के लिए **'handsome'** (सुंदर) Adjective का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: We are decorate the living-room at the moment.
questions.explanation: **'At the moment'** के लिए **Present Continuous Tense ('are decorating')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Men allowed for Olympic artistic swimming for the first time at the 2024 Paris Games, the IOC confirmed on Thursday.
questions.explanation: **'Allowed'** (अनुमति) के स्थान पर **'are eligible'** (योग्य हैं) का प्रयोग सही है.

questions.question: As there was no one to look thorough the orphan, he had to take refuge in the orphanage.
questions.explanation: **'Look after'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **देखभाल करना (take care of)**.

questions.question: There is an old rivalry between the three families for ages.
questions.explanation: **दो से अधिक** (three families) के लिए **'among'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: It is my custom to get up early in the morning.
questions.explanation: **'Custom'** (प्रथा) के स्थान पर **'Habit'** (आदत) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: There was enough room in the spacious flat for all of our furniture.
questions.explanation: **'Spacious'** (विशाल) का अर्थ **'roomy'** (कमरेदार) के समान है.

questions.question: I consider that every matter must be considered in every point of view.
questions.explanation: **'Point of view'** (दृष्टिकोण) के लिए **'from'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Once bitten, thrice shy.
questions.explanation: **"Once bitten, twice shy"** (दूध का जला छाछ भी फूँक फूँक कर पीता है) सही कहावत है.

questions.question: Writing can instill a number of emotions as in a reader.
questions.explanation: **'Within'** (के भीतर) का अर्थ है **'inside'** (अंदर), जो emotions के लिए सही है.

questions.question: Professor Singh is not in the office today. I ask you try call him tomorrow.
questions.explanation: **'Suggest'** (सुझाव) के बाद **Gerund ('calling')** आता है, और **Simple Present** ('suggest') सही है.

questions.question: Bill Gates' fortune was bequeathed for the old age home.
questions.explanation: **'Bequeathed'** (वसीयत में देना) के साथ **Receiver** के लिए **'to'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: He never talks the truth.
questions.explanation: **"Speak the truth"** सही Collocation है.

questions.question: The small size of his store makes it impossible for him to stock all the items.
questions.explanation: दिया गया वाक्य **Grammatically सही** है.

questions.question: He scores good marks in exams as he is quite meticulous.
questions.explanation: **'Meticulous'** का अर्थ है **'Careful'** (सावधान/सावधानीपूर्वक).

questions.question: Alexa have being working as a teacher for five years now.
options: Alexa was been working as a teacher for five years now.
Alexa has been working as a teacher for five years now.
Alexa has being working as a teacher for five years now.
Alexa is being working as a teacher for five years now.
questions.explanation: **Singular Subject ('Alexa')** के लिए **Present Perfect Continuous Tense ('has been working')** सही है.

questions.question: Grasslands should not be foraged and some places are to be closed for grazing.
options: over-grazed and some areas should be
questions.explanation: **'Foraged'** के स्थान पर **'over-grazed'** (अत्यधिक चराई) और **'should be'** (Consistency) का प्रयोग सही है.

questions.question: Things that do not come from the ground not safe to compost.
questions.explanation: **Plural Subject ('Things')** के साथ **Plural Verb ('are')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: UNICEF builds partnerships across the global community on accelerate gender equality.
questions.explanation: **उद्देश्य (Purpose)** बताने के लिए **Infinitive 'to accelerate' ($to+V_{1}$)** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Allusive handwriting creates a poor impression.
questions.explanation: **'Allusive'** के स्थान पर **'Illegible'** (जिसे पढ़ना मुश्किल हो) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Mr. Sen is clever enough to handle his professional hazards.
questions.explanation: **'Clever'** का अर्थ **'Intelligent'** (बुद्धिमान) के समान है.

questions.question: The housing loan taken by Ramesh effected his daily expenses adversely.
questions.explanation: **Verb 'effected'** के स्थान पर **'affected'** (प्रभावित किया) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Although uncountable files stack up on the tables of government officials, they prefer doing their work at a more leisure pace.
questions.explanation: Noun **'pace'** को Modify करने के लिए **Adjective 'leisurely'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: It was a privvilege to receive the award from the President.
questions.explanation: **'Privilege'** सही वर्तनी (Spelling) है.

questions.question: Classical buildings in ancient Greek and Roman times were characteristically built from marble or some other attractive, durable stone.
questions.explanation: **'Characteristically'** (विशेष रूप से) के स्थान पर **'typically'** (आमतौर पर) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: We shall rehearse thrice before the final performance at least we make errors in the dialogues.
questions.explanation: **'Lest'** (ताकि न हो) का प्रयोग **त्रुटियों को रोकने** का उद्देश्य बताता है.

questions.question: This newly arisen evidence could have proved to finally put the culprit behind bars.
questions.explanation: **'Evidence'** स्वयं **'proof'** (प्रमाण) होता है, इसलिए **'is proof'** सबसे उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: If you give away smoking, your health will improve.
questions.explanation: **'Give up'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **छोड़ देना या बंद कर देना**.

questions.question: There was some drawing-pins in my desk.
questions.explanation: **Plural Subject ('drawing-pins')** के लिए **Plural Verb ('are')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The common masses have waited for three hours to meet the king in the royal court.
questions.explanation: **'For three hours'** (Period of Time) के लिए **Present Perfect Continuous Tense ('have been waiting')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: This serum contains ingredients enabling the hair to grow.
options: that enable the hair to grow
questions.explanation: **Relative Pronoun 'that'** का प्रयोग **ingredients** के बारे में अतिरिक्त जानकारी देता है.

questions.question: She argued against the unnecessary split in the committee.
questions.explanation: **'Split'** (विभाजन) का अर्थ **'division'** (बंटवारा) के समान है.

questions.question: Had you been to Dubai, I would also go with you.
questions.explanation: **Third Conditional** Structure: **Had + Sub + V3... would have + V3** ('would have gone').

questions.question: Telangana artists are know for the amazing bronze castings.
options: Have been knew to the amazing bronze castings
Are known for their amazing bronze castings
Is known to the amazing bronze castings
Have to know the amazing bronze castings
questions.explanation: **Passive Voice** में **Plural Subject ('artists')** के लिए **'Are known for' ($is/am/are + V3$)** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: It has been found that the trees are being destroyed by a moth.
questions.explanation: दिया गया वाक्य **Grammatically सही** है (Present Perfect Passive).

questions.question: No sooner did we reach at the party that it began to rain.
questions.explanation: **"No sooner...than"** एक **fixed conjunction pair** है.

questions.question: The interdisciplinary approach utilised in this study facilitates comprehensive understanding of the complex phenomenon under investigation.
options: will have facilitated a comprehensive understanding
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Simple Past Tense** में है, इसलिए **'facilitated'** (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: He passed away in the year 1950 at 10 a.m. on 13 July.
options: in the year 1950 at 10 a.m. on 13 July
on 13 July at 10 a.m. in the year 1950
at 10 a.m. on 13 July in the year 1950
in the year 1950 on 13 July at 10 a.m.
questions.explanation: Time का सही क्रम: **Smallest Unit (at 10 a.m.) > Middle (on 13 July) > Largest (in the year 1950)**.

questions.question: I was in Oman around two months.
questions.explanation: **Period of Time** (अवधि) बताने के लिए **'for'** Preposition का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: The meeting closed with a vote of thanks.
questions.explanation: **'Closed'** (समाप्त हुआ) के लिए **'concluded'** (औपचारिक रूप से समाप्त) अधिक उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: At his wit's end, he decided to return to his parents as he was unable to cope up with the stress of adjusting at a new place.
questions.explanation: **"At his wit's end"** idiom का अर्थ है **कुछ न सूझना (not knowing what to do)**.

questions.question: Peter was the last to know that she had been cheating of him
questions.explanation: **'Cheating on someone'** (किसी को धोखा देना) सही Phrasal Verb है.

questions.question: The film was made in Botswana, whose wildlife is larger to those in Kenya.
questions.explanation: **Plural Subject ('wildlife parks')** के लिए **'are larger than'** (Comparative Degree) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: I opened the box beneath the table and took of a book, the Materia Medica.
questions.explanation: **'Took out'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **बाहर निकालना (take/remove from)**.

questions.question: Do not later about the street.
questions.explanation: **'Loiter around'** phrasal verb का अर्थ है **बिना उद्देश्य के घूमना**.

questions.question: The experienced surgeon handled the delicate procedure with care and precision.
questions.explanation: **'Experienced'** (अनुभवी) का अर्थ **'seasoned'** (अत्यधिक अनुभवी) के समान है.

questions.question: Planning to go for a movie just before the final-year examination is nothing but skating on thin ice.
questions.explanation: **"Skating on thin ice"** idiom का अर्थ है **जोखिमपूर्ण स्थिति में होना (being in a risky situation)**.

questions.question: Shakespeare is greater than any other English poet.
questions.explanation: **Past tense ('was')** का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि Shakespeare अब जीवित नहीं हैं.

questions.question: I prefer walking than riding.
questions.explanation: Verb **'prefer'** के साथ **'to'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है (prefer...to...).

questions.question: Youth is the time when the seeds of character is sown.
options: the seeds of character had been sown
the seeds of character were sown
the seeds of character will have been sowing
the seeds of character are sown
questions.explanation: **Plural Subject ('seeds')** के लिए **Plural Verb ('are')** का प्रयोग होगा (Simple Present Passive).
